title: Telerehabilitation in patients with respiratory tract diseases: protocol for a scoping review
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4og5u","text":"Background","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"crqod","text":"Telerehabilitation is delivery of therapeutic rehabilitation at a distance or offsite using telecommunication technologies. However, telerehabilitation for respiratory diseases and respiratory infections is not known. During the COVID-19 pandemic, telerehabilitation may represent the first option for people at home. The COVID-19 is one of respiratory tract disease, and rapid and widespread transmission was demonstrated. Therefore, it is necessary consider telerehabilitation in patients with respiratory tract disease in the acute phase in hospital as well as chronic phase from the perspective of infection prevention.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dr0f7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bcdrj","text":"Aim","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"73ln8","text":"The purpose of this scoping review is to assess the intervention program, safety and feasibility of telerehabilitation for patients with respiratory tract diseases in the COVID-19 era.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e1gfi","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4hevn","text":"Methods and analysis","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9b92c","text":"We describe this protocol that follows the PRISMA extension for scoping reviews (PRISMA-ScR) statement. We also use the scoping review framework by The Joanna Briggs Institute following five stage approach: (1) identify the research question; (2) identify relevant studies; (3) select studies; (4) chart the data and (5) collating, summarize and report the results.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ebsr","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"njsr","text":"Ethics and dissemination","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3hr4i","text":"In this scoping review, only data from previously conducted studies will be analyzed. We will publish this scoping review in peer-reviewed journals.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Shunsuke Taito
